# MDE v1.5.11

## Features

- Added a path-search mode to the workspace search dialog, using the existing global search surface with a compact mode radio group.
- Added VS Code-style slash-segment fuzzy matching for workspace Markdown paths, so queries like `doc/nst/dp` can match `docs/nested/deep.md`.
- Added `Cmd+P` / `Ctrl+P` to open path search directly; pressing it again while the dialog is open cycles between path search and content search.
- Added shortcut hints on hover for the workspace search mode buttons.

## Bug Fixes

- Prevented path-search selections from starting the current-editor text search; selecting a path result now opens that Markdown file directly.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added unit, integration, and E2E coverage for workspace path matching, mode switching, shortcut behavior, and direct file opening.

## Documentation

- Updated the Chinese user manual search page with path search, `/` fuzzy matching, mode shortcut hints, and `Cmd+P` / `Ctrl+P` behavior.

## Verification

- `pnpm run lint`
- `pnpm run typecheck`
- `pnpm run docs:build`
- `pnpm run build`
- `pnpm run test:unit`
- `pnpm run test:integration`
- `pnpm run test:e2e`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/desktop test`

## Artifacts

- GitHub Actions will build and publish macOS and Windows desktop artifacts for this release.
